description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a bold red frame and black diamond-patterned panels. The front displays a large screen area with a marquee labeled 'Princess Quest' in white, illuminated text. Below the screen, the control panel includes a single joystick and two buttons, colored yellow and blue, suggesting a single-player setup. The lower front section houses a coin slot and access panel. Both side panels are decorated with a whimsical illustration of a glowing princess holding a lantern, set against a dark silhouette of a castle, enhancing the fantasy theme. The top and rear surfaces are plain, with the back showing ventilation grilles and access panels.
description: A red and black upright arcade game cabinet with 'Princess Quest' marquee, fantasy-themed side art, and a single-player control panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Princess Quest' marquee, large screen, single joystick, two buttons, and coin slot.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the princess and castle artwork, with the cabinet's profile and red trim visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back panel with ventilation grilles and access panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, featuring the same princess and castle artwork and red trim.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two buttons (yellow and blue) arranged in a simple row.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'Princess Quest' in white on a black background, illuminated, with a simple and bold style.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display a glowing princess holding a lantern, set against a dark castle silhouette, with a fantasy theme and warm yellow highlights.
